mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistically significant positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0 percent, labor market slack signals weakening consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and capital expenditure growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint positive deviation of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a Rank IC above 0.04 in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the index of industrial production reflects supply-side contraction and capacity utilization stress, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in over 60% of observations during tightening periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate falls below 0.5 percent, extreme monetary accommodation compresses equity discount rates and triggers positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns are negative in more than 50% of periods where FEDFUNDS drops below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between declining total nonfarm payrolls and rising unemployment signals structural labor market deterioration, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The PAYEMS-UNRATE divergence fails to predict negative 60-day returns with a statistically significant out-of-sample accuracy above 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product confirms macroeconomic expansion and supports corporate revenue forecasts, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show a negative or zero correlation with 20-day forward SPX returns across multiple rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals expanding manufacturing capacity and improving corporate margins, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration is followed by negative 5-day SPX returns in over 65% of observations during recovery phases.
